content.body:
ReadAllScopes(cwd) walks up from cwd, reads memory docs from every
ancestor .leo/, and merges results nearest-first. Child copies win on
ID conflict. Docs from ancestor scopes are tagged Inherited=true
(in-memory only) so callers can treat them as read-only. Writes
continue to go to NearestWritable unchanged.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: feat: add multi-scope KB read merging
